text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Grass Wonder runs a picture-perfect
race, it doesn't clear her reputation as
Maruzensky's successor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets her sights on a direct clash with
Maruzensky to break free of the association once
and for all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she needs to build up experience in the
Classics first to make it a reality. The Japanese
Derby becomes our next goal.
